The :attribute must be a valid email add: The :attribute must be a valid email address.
The :attribute must be at least :min cha: The :attribute must be at least :min characters.
The :attribute must not be greater than: The :attribute must not be greater than :max characters.
The :attribute must be a valid URL.
The :attribute must be a valid date.
The :attribute must be a file of type: :: The :attribute must be a file of type: :values.
The :attribute must not be greater than: The :attribute must not be greater than :max kilobytes.
The :attribute must be a valid JSON stri: The :attribute must be a valid JSON string.
